title: Swilia's Usage ModPack
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53db1379a8a71623db7e124a41ec1faf25d9c8c_0.webp)
#

Swilla's Usage modpack is a v1.21.4 only modpack that isn't for optimizing, but to give an experience, making it a difference from the rest

See the [Installation Instructions](https://docs.ehis.gay/minecraft/swilias-usage-modpack/installing-the-modpack) when installing the modpack, for launchers that can't support downloading from modrinth, you may need to use the installing the modpack [Externally](https://docs.ehis.gay/minecraft/swilias-usage-modpack/installing-the-modpack-externally)

# Here's how it compares

|  Feature                                                      | Fabulously Optimized  | Simply Optimized | Remarkably Optimized | Performium | Sodium Plus  | Swilla's Usage ModPack |
|---------------------------------------------------------------|:----------------------:|:-----------------:|:---------------------:|:----------:|:-------------:|:------------------------:|
| Mojang Screen Removed (Game Boot)                             | ❌                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Minecraft Options Configured By Default                       | ❌                     | 🟨                | 🟨                    | 🟨         | 🟪             | ✅                        |
| Loading Terrain Removed                                       | ❌                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ✅         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Fast Quitting Worlds (Quit Fast Mod)                                 | ✅                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Resource Pack Screen (Changing Packs) Removed                 | ✅                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Zoom way better (Zoomify)                                     | ✅                     | ❌                | ✅                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Mod Menu                                                      | ✅                     | ❌                | ✅                    | ✅         | ✅             | ✅                        |
| Server Resource Pack Control                                  | ❌                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Pack Downloader and many more in-game                         | ❌                     | ❌                | ✅                    | ✅         | ❌             | ✅                        |
| Resource Explorer (Resource Pack Folder Viewer)               | ❌                     | ❌                | ❌                    | ❌         | ❌             | ✅                        |


<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

#

Tested on version 1.21+ only, on modpack versions:

Fabulosly Optimized - Fabulously Optimized 6.5.0-beta.10

Simply Optimized - Simply Optimized 1.21.4-2.0.1

Remarkably Optimized - Remarkably Optimized 1.13.1

Performium - Performium v1.1.0-Release+1

Sodium Plus - Sodium Plus 2.3.1-beta.1

#

Section 2 for Sodium Plus - Configured but not the music or etc

Section 2 for Remarkably Optimized - GUI Scale is not configured (Defaults to auto), And there's only the built in Frabic Packs with Resource Packs from a Mod Only

Section 2 of Performium - Barely Configured, but not the FOV, neither the Resource Packs that cames with the modpack are enabled

Section 2 of Simply Optimized - GUI Scale set to 3, nothing else

</details>


## But what does change even?

### Worlds

It Removes "Loading Terrain..." forever and ever (And Loads Fast!) when changing worlds/creating worlds, so it doesn't feel like a pain to watch

![Changing Worlds Example](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/3.gif)
![Creating World Example](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/1_wsrv_safe-d-d.gif)


When saving worlds, you will be already at the menu, as the world is saved in the background (Shown at the top right)

![Saving World](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/2_wsrv_safe-d-d.gif)

### Resource Packs

It removes the Mojang/Loading screen when changing any resource pack, so you can move while it loads on the background

![Changing Resource Pack](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/5.gif)

### Server Resource Packs

You can control the way Server Resource Packs are, not from the usual "Accept or don't connect", you can either Ignore (Accepts but doesn't apply - Works on servers) Accept it, but with a check if you want the server to override (Change) the existing resources from your enabled Resource Packs on your client!

![Server Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b8c400f0e9d41f042d2976332c99a1dbc733e88_0.webp)

### Game Launching

The game will boot in the menu instantly, as because of the Loading Screen and The Mojang Logo is removed!

![Game Booting](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/3_wsrv_safe-d-a.gif)

# Other

### HUD and UI

The UI is from [Catppuccin UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/catppuccin-ui) While if you want, you can apply the [Etsan's Better Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/etsans-better-hotbar) or [AxeFactor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mobregons-2k-pack) for PvP!*

![C](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6389ecdb85752e5a09d0e0c5e73e133fa4db692a.png)

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e51d1ccdbba83de3f34f2b4b5fb639741c2aa06.png)

*On Versions starting 1.2 and above, not [v1.2 (Beta 1)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/swilias-usage-modpack/version/v1.2b1) and below

### Flashback built in

If you want to record your gameplays, [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) is built in here, you simply need to Start The Recording

![Flashblack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0d84dd89a28c52d257efbf139d6947ee43929b.png)

### Download DataPacks/Resource Packs/Shaders/etc...

You can download worlds*, resource packs, shaders and other stuff in-game, from modrinth or curseforge!

![Resource Pack Downloader](https://file.garden/Z3KJJNblz3hn1N0w/modpack/ResourcePacksInGame.png)

*Worlds are CurseForge Only

### Information when looking in a block

I mean, you can see which block is even if its from a resource pack

![Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e806ae047fe2e786f53ca776d33df470dc33b51.png)

### Player Heads

Player Heads will show on chat when they chat, or with server messages

![Player Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79939c24e593c1dbad1e7fe4881a879f074597f2.png)

### Pre-Built in Worlds

The ModPack Comes with prebuilt in worlds to test already the modpack**!

![Worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/369ceb7f040401d290c741d8abda15468527c3cb_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>*</summary>

_*The modpack will take a while to extract before downloading mods_

_*Worlds from CurseForge:_

_Medieval Port City by [ForgiaDeiBuilder](https://www.curseforge.com/members/forgiadeibuilder) & [Millenniar](https://www.curseforge.com/members/millenniar)_

_Voidblock by [LoweredgamesDev](https://www.curseforge.com/members/loweredgamesdev/projects)_

_Xbox Tutorial 31 by [noxgame1230](https://www.curseforge.com/members/noxgame1230/projects)_

</details>


# Hello there... did you ready need to scroll down?

Well, this modpack is built from a single person, if you enjoyed using the modpack you can consider donating to my Ko-Fi if you want me to continue working!
